news.title: ‘Super cycle’: ASX down 2.8pc for the week
news.snippet: The Australian share market has closed federal budget week with another loss, posting a 2.8 per cent dip since Monday.

news.title: ‘Regime shift’: ASX warning after CBA bloodbath
news.snippet: After 14 million people’s superannuation took a hit this week, asset managers warn of a “regime change” on the Australian share market.

news.title: ‘Sacred cow’: Tax change divides experts
news.snippet: Australia has “wasted billions” making housing unaffordable through investor tax breaks, but a radical budget shake-up changes everything.

news.title: ‘Talking in circles’: Albo’s answer on tax backfires
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese sat down with a financial influencer to explain a major new tax to young Aussies. But his answers have left viewers more confused.

news.title: ‘Collision with reality’: The $100 billion downfall of an Aussie giant
news.snippet: There is no hiding from the bloody mess at CSL, one of Australia’s global success stories. Can it recover?

news.title: Boeing ordered to pay $69m to the family of woman killed in plane crash
news.snippet: The 24-year-old American was travelling to Uganda for her job with a non-profit organisation when the plane crashed minutes after take-off in 2019.

news.title: Major airline axes Aussie flights to Bali
news.snippet: A budget airline has axed two major Australian routes to Bali, citing the surging price of fuel.
